name: Single Port 20W USB-C Wall Charger - dealworthy™ White: Quick Charge, Short Circuit & Surge Protection
description:

Compatible with devices that use a USB-C connection, this wall charger is backed by a 1-year limited warranty, making it an ideal choice for easy, daily use.
